about.text:
About Us - ABM
Skip to content
No items found.
Skip to content
No items found.
About
Rooted in commitment, driven by a relentless pursuit of excellence
ABM drives possibility for a healthier, more sustainable, ever-changing world. Our diverse team of over 100,000 specialists delivers facility, engineering, and infrastructure solutions that make spaces more resilient, intelligent, and connected.
We support 19 industries, serving six billion square feet of space every day to improve the health, productivity, and sustainability of the places important to you.
ABM's Mission: To make a difference, every person, every day
We believe in the possibility of our mission. Indeed, we’re already making a difference. Our clients see and feel our passion for doing things right. Comfortable, safe, satisfied occupants… an energy efficient facility running like clockwork.
Every Person, Every Day
Make a Difference
Make a Difference
Coming Together to Give Back and Transform Lives
View Story
Make a Difference
Helping A Texas School District Educate "Giants" With Our Energy Project
View Story
Make a Difference
A New Office Opening Was A Perfect Opportunity To Give Back
View Story
About ABM
ABM's Purpose
To take care of the people, spaces, and places that are important to you
Every team member honors our purpose. We’re a service organization with the processes, products, and expertise to take care of spaces and places. We help clients elevate experiences for the people they serve.
Spaces
Offices where people work hard to support their families
Pharmaceutical cleanrooms where cures are discovered
College campuses where students learn and grow
Places
A massive stadium where friends cheer their team
The hospital where a loved one gets better
A parking deck easing the way for eco-conscious drivers
About ABM
ABM's Vision
To be the clear choice in the industries we serve through engaged people
Why has more than half of the Fortune 500 chosen ABM?  Because we anticipate clients’ needs and advise them proactively. Large and small, all kinds of facilities rely on our vast experience, performing all kinds of services.
Your vision and ours, aligned: From expert ABM advisors in your industry to each person who works at your site, our engaged team members are committed to consistent excellence and the results you need. Our field-tested innovations and a focus on sustainability prove our commitment to invest in the future. That’s how we drive possibility, together.
The core of everything we do
We embrace six fundamental values that define our culture and the way we work.
Respect
Every person brings value and is acknowledged as an asset to our team.
Integrity
We are sincere, trustworthy, and accountable. We tell the truth and do not tolerate behavior that breaches our values.
Collaboration
We believe that we can do better and achieve more when we work together and learn from our collective experiences.
Innovation
We bring fresh ideas and data-driven insights to solve business challenges. We ask: What if? Why not? What’s next?
Excellence
We deliver consistent, reliable service, but we don’t stop there. We are committed to exceeding expectations.
Trust
We build confidence and demonstrate that we are worthy of keeping it.
Where we've come from
ABM History
See our full timeline
View timeline
Our brand heritage began in 1909 with founder Morris Rosenberg's modest investment of $4.50 in a window cleaning business. This journey of over a century has witnessed ABM evolve from an individual venture into a dynamic and expansive organization, ever focused on our clients. Rooted in commitment and driven by a relentless pursuit of excellence, ABM’s history has been one of transformative growth and enduring values. Strategic acquisitions have expanded our platform with integrated services and broad capabilities. We’re proud of our award-winning workforce and automation technologies that drive efficiencies in the thousands of physical assets we service and maintain.
Elevate
ELE
